description_long: This is a military-style shotgun with a robust, boxy receiver finished in matte olive green, featuring a metallic emblem with wings on the side. The weapon has a full black stock and a pistol grip, both ergonomically shaped for stability and comfort. The barrel is relatively short and thick, with a metallic muzzle and a small sight at the front. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for gloved fingers. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements aside from the emblem, and the construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components. The shotgun's compact form and sturdy build suggest it is designed for close-quarters use in urban environments.
description: A compact, olive green military-style shotgun with a full black stock, pistol grip, and metallic winged emblem, built for close-quarters use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the olive green receiver, metallic winged emblem, full black stock, pistol grip, and short barrel with a metallic muzzle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle opening, compact barrel, and the narrow profile of the stock and grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the plain olive green receiver, black stock, and the absence of the emblem seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the black stock and the narrow alignment of the receiver and barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and thick with a metallic muzzle
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible reinforcement
